turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: For calling Pivot Point Orthopedics part of pretty good AI. How may I help you today?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Hi, I need a refill for my medication and wanted to ask how long it takes.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: To see, you're calling from the number we have on file. Am I speaking with Alex?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Yes, that's me.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please provide your date of birth.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: It's June 12, 1990.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I need your full date of birth to continue. Could you please tell me your date of birth?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Sure, it's June 12 1990.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I’d like to request a refill for my medication.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Match our records.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Okay, the medication I need refilled is for my ongoing treatment.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I don't see any.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Could you double-check? I’ve been on it for a while now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That can take your time. Let me know if you find any details or if you have other questions.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I really need that refill. Can you confirm if you have my prescription history?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I checked your chart but I don't see any medications listed for refill. If you believe there should be something on file, I can connect you to our patient support team for further help.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Yes, please connect me to the patient support team. I’d like to resolve this.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Connecting you to a representative.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Thank you!

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You reached the pretty good. AI test line, goodbye.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Wait, I still need help with my medication!

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Goodbye!
